title: 5.93ct Lab Grown Gemstone Neon Blue Paraiba Halo Ring S925
description:
Discover the elegance of lab-grown gemstones combined with the durability of S925 sterling silver. Lab-grown gemstones offer the same stunning beauty and brilliance as natural stones, but with a more sustainable and affordable approach. Paired with premium S925 silver, this ring is not only hypoallergenic and tarnish-resistant, but also built to last, making it perfect for daily wear or special occasions.

This exquisite Paraíba ring features a breathtaking 5.93-carat lab-grown Paraíba gemstone as the center stone, known for its mesmerizing, light blue hue that captures the essence of tropical waters. Surrounded by a halo of smaller stones totaling 2.7 carats, this ring radiates brilliance from every angle. Weighing 4.95 grams, this piece is lightweight yet substantial, delivering a luxurious feel. Paraíba gemstones are renowned for their rare and vibrant color, making this ring a true statement piece that adds a touch of sophistication to any look. and is available in sizes 5 to 7.5 (standard U.S. sizing). Please note that lab-grown colored gemstone rings have an estimated shipping time of 3-15 days.

Key Features:

Lab-Grown Paraíba Gemstone: A stunning 8*11mm 5.93-carat center stone with a rare and radiant light blue color.

Halo Design: Encircled by 2.7 carats of accent stones for added sparkle and elegance.

Premium S925 Sterling Silver: Hypoallergenic, tarnish-resistant, and durable for long-lasting wear.

Lightweight Yet Luxurious: Weighs 4.95 grams, providing a comfortable but substantial feel.

Eco-Friendly and Affordable: Lab-grown gemstones offer an ethical, high-quality alternative to mined stones.
